Process

No briefings that go nowhere. No chasing freelancers. No agency overhead. Just results, consistently.

What we deliver

Everything creative,
under one roof

From a single banner to a full brand system. All included in your subscription.

Brand Identity
Logos, color systems, typography, and brand guidelines that make you instantly recognizable.
Web Design

Ad Creatives
Meta, Google, TikTok — scroll-stopping ads optimized for performance and platform.
Social Media
Templates, posts, stories, and reels that keep your brand consistent across every channel.
Copywriting
Website copy, ad scripts, email sequences, and brand voice documents — words that sell.
Presentations
Pitch decks, investor presentations, and sales decks that command the room.

FAQ

Questions, answered

What is a design subscription and how does it work?+
A design subscription replaces the need to hire a full-time designer or work with unpredictable freelancers. You pay one flat monthly fee and get access to a dedicated creative partner who delivers your requests one by one, fast. You submit tasks, we deliver, you approve or request changes, and then we move to the next one.
How fast will I receive my deliverables?+
Most requests are completed within 24 business hours. More complex work such as full website designs, complete brand systems, or long-form copy may take up to 48 hours. We are always transparent about timelines before we begin.
How does the request queue work?+
You can add as many requests as you like to your queue at any time through your dedicated Slack channel. We work through them one at a time, delivering each before moving on to the next. There is no limit to how many you can have waiting in the queue.
How many revisions do I get?+
Each request includes up to 2 rounds of revisions. This keeps the process focused and efficient for both sides. In practice, most requests are approved after the first delivery or the first revision. If something is genuinely not what was briefed, we will of course make it right.
How does pausing work?+
Billing runs on monthly cycles. If you pause partway through your month, your remaining days are saved and not lost. You can resume at any point and pick up exactly where you left off. Just let us know via Slack and we handle it immediately.
Do I own the files?+
Yes, fully. Every delivered file and its source assets belong entirely to you from the moment it is approved. You hold full rights to use, modify, license, and sell the work however you see fit.
What if I only have one or two requests right now?+
No problem at all. Pause your subscription once your immediate requests are done and resume whenever new work comes up. Paused days carry forward to your next active period, so nothing is wasted.
Ready to move faster?

Stop waiting for great design.

Join Infivus today. Your first request can be in the queue within the hour.

Get in touch

Let's talk about
your project

Have a question before subscribing, or want to discuss a specific project? Send a message and we will get back to you within one business day.

Payment confirmed

Welcome to
Infivus

Your subscription is active. You will receive a Stripe receipt in your inbox shortly, and we will reach out via Slack within the hour to get you onboarded.

What happens next
We will invite you to your dedicated Slack channel within the hour. Once you are in, you can submit your first request straight away using the form below, or directly in Slack. Source files and final deliverables will be shared with you via Slack or a shared Figma/Google Drive link depending on the task type.
Submit your first request Back to home
Let's get started

Submit your
first request

Tell us what you need and we will get started right away. The more detail you provide, the faster and more accurate the result.

01
Be specific
Describe the output you need — not just the goal. "Design a 1080x1080 Instagram post for our product launch" works better than "something for social."
02
Share references
Include links to examples you like, your brand guidelines, or any existing assets. Drop them in the notes field below.
03
Set a deadline if needed
Standard delivery is 48h. If you have a hard deadline, mention it and we will prioritize accordingly.
Request received

We're on it — you'll hear from us soon

Your request has been submitted and we have received it in our inbox. Expect a delivery or update within 48 hours on business days. We will reach out via Slack if we need any clarifications.

Submit another request Back to home

Haftung für Inhalte

Als Diensteanbieter sind wir gemäß § 7 Abs. 1 TMG für eigene Inhalte auf diesen Seiten nach den allgemeinen Gesetzen verantwortlich. Nach §§ 8 bis 10 TMG sind wir als Diensteanbieter jedoch nicht verpflichtet, übermittelte oder gespeicherte fremde Informationen zu überwachen. Verpflichtungen zur Entfernung oder Sperrung nach allgemeinen Gesetzen bleiben hiervon unberührt.

Haftung für Links

Unser Angebot enthält Links zu externen Websites Dritter, auf deren Inhalte wir keinen Einfluss haben. Für die Inhalte der verlinkten Seiten ist stets der jeweilige Anbieter verantwortlich.

Urheberrecht

Die durch die Seitenbetreiber erstellten Inhalte unterliegen dem deutschen Urheberrecht. Die Vervielfältigung außerhalb der Grenzen des Urheberrechtes bedarf der schriftlichen Zustimmung des Autors.

Streitschlichtung

Die Europäische Kommission stellt eine Plattform zur OS bereit: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. Wir nehmen nicht an Streitbeilegungsverfahren teil.

Datenschutzerklärung

1. Datenschutz auf einen Blick

Die folgenden Hinweise geben einen Überblick darüber, was mit Ihren personenbezogenen Daten passiert, wenn Sie diese Website besuchen.

2. Verantwortliche Stelle

Infivus / [Dein vollständiger Name]

[Straße], [PLZ] [Stadt], Deutschland

E-Mail:

3. Datenerfassung auf dieser Website

Beim Besuch dieser Website werden technische Informationen wie IP-Adresse, Browsertyp und Zugriffszeit erfasst. Diese Daten werden ausschließlich für den sicheren Betrieb der Website verwendet.

Wenn Sie das Kontaktformular oder das Anfrageformular ausfüllen, werden Ihre Daten über Web3Forms verarbeitet und direkt an unsere E-Mail-Adresse weitergeleitet. Weitere Informationen: web3forms.com/privacy.

4. Rechtsgrundlage der Verarbeitung

Wir verarbeiten Ihre Daten auf Grundlage von Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO zur Vertragserfüllung (Abonnement-Abwicklung über Stripe) sowie Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. f DSGVO für den sicheren Betrieb der Website.

5. Drittanbieter-Dienste

Stripe: Zahlungsabwicklung. Datenschutz: stripe.com/de/privacy.

Web3Forms: Kontaktformular-Backend. Datenschutz: web3forms.com/privacy.

Vercel: Website-Hosting. Datenschutz: vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy.

6. Ihre Rechte

Sie haben das Recht auf Auskunft (Art. 15 DSGVO), Berichtigung (Art. 16), Löschung (Art. 17), Einschränkung (Art. 18) und Widerspruch (Art. 21 DSGVO). Anfragen an:

7. Cookies

Diese Website verwendet ausschließlich technisch notwendige Cookies. Es werden keine Tracking- oder Werbe-Cookies eingesetzt.

8. Aktualität

Stand: Mai 2025. Wir behalten uns vor, diese Erklärung bei Bedarf anzupassen.
